## Summary

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new route
- [ ] Lore / RFC / copy update
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] New encoding logic lives in `src/utils/` and has a test
- [ ] Copy doesn't contradict [LORE.md](../LORE.md)
- [ ] Word "byte" not used where "SYTE" fits
